notes: Graded by skill-creator's grader. hf-brand-extract is a STRUCTURAL skill (an optional onboarding asset): the assertions check that a real brand block was DERIVED (not invented) and written to artifacts/<project>/context.md with the exact keys concept/build read, plus the capture/cutout provenance files. There is no rendered media here, so there are no [media-judge] assertions — the one frame check on the logo cutout is a structural transparency check, not a quality grade. Derived from 1-requirements.md (the brand-kit precondition shared by JTBD-1..4) and the §5 artifact-path map. Assumes ai-gen (bria) + hyperframes capture are reachable in-sandbox; an unreachable source must be a clean recorded failure, never a fabricated kit.

evals.name: brand-from-url-full-kit
evals.prompt: Brand a new project from https://acme.com so the video matches our site.
expectations: runs hyperframes capture on the URL and writes artifacts/<project>/assets/captures/brand-capture.json with a source, a non-empty colors[] (hex), fonts[], and screenshots[]
appends (or merges) a '## Brand' section to artifacts/<project>/context.md containing accent (a 6-digit hex), accentAlt (a 6-digit hex), fontPack (one of modern|editorial|bold|tech), and label
the accent is a saturated brand color (not body grey, pure black, or pure white) drawn from brand-capture.json — not invented
fontPack maps to a runtime-supported family set (Inter / Outfit / Anton / Fraunces / Space Grotesk); no CDN font or var() family is written
runs ai-gen fal-ai/bria/background/remove and writes a transparent artifacts/<project>/assets/cutouts/logo.png, then records 'logo: assets/cutouts/logo.png' in the brand block
the reply states the resolved accent/accentAlt/fontPack/label and notes any default/derived value; no HeyGen auth or cloud is used

evals.name: brand-from-screenshot-no-url
evals.prompt: Here's a screenshot of our brand — pull the colors, fonts, and logo from it.
expectations: uses screenshot mode (does NOT call hyperframes capture): Reads the image and writes brand-capture.json with source set to the image path and the dominant colors + visible typeface
writes a '## Brand' section to artifacts/<project>/context.md with accent (hex), accentAlt (hex), fontPack, and label derived from the screenshot — not fabricated
runs ai-gen bria on the logo region and writes a transparent artifacts/<project>/assets/cutouts/logo.png (or, if no logo is found, omits the 'logo:' line and says so)
the brand fields use only runtime-supported font families and real hex colors

evals.name: unreachable-source-clean-failure
expectations: capture.sh exits non-zero and writes a brand-capture.json carrying an 'error' (no fabricated colors or fonts)
records the failure in artifacts/<project>/state.md and does NOT write an invented '## Brand' section (or writes none) — the kit falls back to neutral
does not prompt the user (headless); the reply explains the source was unreachable and onboarding can proceed with a neutral kit

evals.name: bria-unavailable-still-writes-kit
evals.prompt: Brand from https://acme.com (the logo cutout service may be down).
expectations: still writes the '## Brand' section with accent/accentAlt/fontPack/label from the capture even when ai-gen bria exits non-zero
omits the 'logo:' line (no fabricated cutout path) and notes 'no logo cutout' in the reply
brand-capture.json is still written for provenance; the extract is NOT failed just because the logo cutout failed
